examples: Pursuit of happiness is unalienable right for everyone.
Humor expressed by linguistic method is unalienable to the inherent principles of the language itself.
While we embrace our unalienable rights, we abhor the value that other cultures place on collective conformity and obedience to authority.
These actions, too, are about the Constitution and securing our unalienable rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness.
Particularly for those like myself who believe strongly in both unalienable natural rights as well as traditional standards of conduct.
